Analysis & Decision Making
How to analyse and make decisions on where to place your focus depending on your
goals for the account.
Account metrics analysis
A look at how I use the external data sheet to analyse performance and decide on where I
need to place my focus
00:00 / 0:00
Take Control of CPA & ROAS
A practical guide on:
- How Cost per Acquisition (Lead, Sale, Reg, App Install etc) is influenced by cost per click
and Website Conversion Rate
- The factors behind improving both metrics
- Online sales: How to influence ROAS and CPA
- How manipulating both CPA and AOV will directly improve profits
- Using a CPA calculator to figure out your optimisation plan
00:00 / 0:00
The CPA Calculator
The CPA calculator can help you determine your targets and allows you to reassess your
goals as you optimise and grow your account.
Once you've watched the demo grab your version here (make a copy and store locally)
00:00 / 0:00
Using Delivery Insights
A demonstration on how and why to use delivery insights to understand:
- how to find out if your audience has become saturated, meaning that you have reached
everyone in your target audience and it its time to refresh your creative audiences.
- how to find what percentage of your audience have seen your ad for the first time; the
higher this is the less likely it is your creative needs refreshing.
- how to track audience overlap and the key metrics to look out for.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

00:00 / 0:00
Using Facebook Analytics
A webinar explaining the basics of Facebook Analytics to get you familiar with it to explore what can
be achieved with deeper insights.
The main use right now for me is setting up Funnels, so tracking each step from landing page, key
page, cart, sales. This will be individual to your setup.
Have a play and ask questions in the Mastermind.
